ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "insurance_details" TEXT /* Insurance details of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vital_signs" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient being measured */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient at the time of measurement */,
  "hr" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the patient */,
  "pulse" INTEGER /* Pulse rate of the patient */,
  "resp" INTEGER /* Respiratory rate of the patient */,
  "spo2" INTEGER /* Blood oxygen saturation of the patient */,
  "ssbp" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure of the patient */,
  "dsbp" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure of the patient */,
  "tv" REAL /* Temperature of the patient */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for each vital sign */,
  "abnormality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the measurement is abnormal */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who took the measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of the measurement (e.g., Heart Rate, Blood Pressure) */,
  "measurement_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical staff */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Doctor, Nurse) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the staff member */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the staff member */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the appointment */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member conducting the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  "appointment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the appointment */,
  "appointment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "dosage_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the medication should be taken */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for medication administration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for medication administration */,
  "medication_start_time" TEXT /* Start time for medication administration */,
  "medication_end_time" TEXT /* End time for medication administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allergy record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient with the allergy */,
  "allergy_name" TEXT /* Name of the allergen */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* Description of the reaction to the allergen */,
  "allergy_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the allergy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allergies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "date_of_diagnosis" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ward_information" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the ward */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff in charge of the ward */,
  "ward_location" TEXT /* Location of the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ward_information_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ward the room belongs to */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of the room (e.g., ICU, Regular) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room */,
  "room_status" TEXT /* Current status of the room */,
  "room_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment available in the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES ward_information ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient being billed */,
  "amount_due" REAL /* Total amount due */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Total amount paid */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date of billing */,
  "billing_status" TEXT /* Current status of the billing record */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the billing record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose record was accessed */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff accessing the record */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the patient record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
